Package org.atmosphere.config.managed

package org.atmosphere.config.managed
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.atmosphere.config
     
    org.atmosphere.config.service
     
  • Class
    Description
    AnnotatedLifecycle
    Shared lifecycle and injection support for annotated endpoint classes.
    AtmosphereHandlerServiceInterceptor
    Handle Singleton and AtmosphereHandlerService processing.
    Decoder<U,T>
    Decode a message in order to invoke a class annotated with ManagedService with a method annotated with Message.
    Encoder<U,T>
    Encode a message returned by a method annotated with Message or a ManagedService annotated class.
    Invoker
    Invoke a method based on Encoder and Decoder
    ManagedAtmosphereHandler
    An internal implementation of AtmosphereHandler that implement support for Atmosphere 2.0 annotations.
    ManagedAtmosphereHandler.Managed
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Use RawMessage instead.
    ManagedAtmosphereHandler.MethodInfo
     
    ManagedServiceInterceptor
    Handle Singleton for ManagedService processing.
    ManagedServiceInterceptor.ManagedAnnotation
     
    ServiceInterceptor
    Abstract sealed base class for service interceptors that handle wildcard path routing and path parameter injection for annotated Atmosphere services.
    TypeResolver
    Enhanced type resolution utilities.
    TypeResolver.Unknown
    An unknown type.
